name: MINI (BMW Group sub-brand) DTC starter
default_source: Mini BMW ISTA / Mini Connected DTCs

dtcs.description: MINI — Tire Pressure Indicator (RDC) — Pressure Below Threshold
MINI — Brake-pedal switch circuit (cruise interlock)
MINI Cooper S / JCW (B48) — Turbocharger overboost
MINI Cooper S / JCW (B48) — Turbocharger underboost
MINI — Cylinder 1 misfire (common after coil pack failure)
MINI — Cylinder 2 misfire
MINI — Cylinder 3 misfire (3-cyl B38)
MINI — Cylinder 4 misfire (4-cyl B48)
Catalyst Efficiency Below Threshold (Mini Cooper)
repair_guidance: 1) Read freeze-frame data and verify the fault is current.
2) Inspect the affected sensor / actuator wiring for chafing, corrosion, or loose connectors.
3) Measure circuit resistance + supply voltage with a multimeter.
4) Compare live data against expected values per OEM service data.
5) Replace the defective component if all wiring tests pass.

dtcs.description: MINI — EVAP small-leak (loose fuel cap)
MINI — EVAP large leak
MINI — Engine oil pressure low (B48 oil pump failure pattern)
MINI Cooper E / SE — Drive Motor Temperature Sensor Circuit
MINI Cooper E / SE / Aceman — HV battery isolation fault
MINI Cooper E / SE — On-board charger DC/DC performance
VANOS Bank 1: Stuck (Mini N12/N14/B38)
repair_guidance: 1) Run live data: target vs actual cam advance per bank.
2) Check engine oil quality and level — VVT solenoids fail with old/dirty oil.
3) Inspect VVT solenoid screen for debris.
4) Replace solenoid; if mechanical (timing chain wear), open inspection.

dtcs.description: MINI — VANOS Solenoid Bank 1 stuck closed
MINI — Eccentric Shaft Sensor (Valvetronic) plausibility
MINI — Camshaft phaser solenoid (B38 / B48 / B58)
Battery Registration Required (Mini)
repair_guidance: 1) Read freeze-frame data and verify the fault is current.
2) Inspect the affected sensor / actuator wiring for chafing, corrosion, or loose connectors.
3) Measure circuit resistance + supply voltage with a multimeter.
4) Compare live data against expected values per OEM service data.
5) Replace the defective component if all wiring tests pass.

dtcs.description: MINI — High-speed CAN bus 'A' off
MINI — Lost Communication With iDrive / NBT
MINI Cooper E / SE — Lost Communication With BMS
MINI — FlexRay Bus Off Error Frame (chassis)
